mapper.insert: insert into tbl_post (member_id, title, content, location, reply_post_id, community_id) values (#{memberId}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{location}, #{replyPostId}, #{communityId})
mapper.update: update tbl_post set title = #{postTitle}, content = #{postContent}, location = #{location}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_post set post_status = 'inactive', updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from tbl_post where post_status = 'active' and reply_post_id is null

select count(*) from tbl_post where post_status = 'active' and reply_post_id is null
and (title like concat('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{search.keyword}, '%'))
mapper.sql: p.id, p.member_id, p.post_status, p.title as post_title, p.content as post_content, p.location, p.reply_post_id, p.created_datetime, p.updated_datetime, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = p.member_id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl where pl.post_id = p.id) as like_count, (select count(*) from tbl_post rp where rp.reply_post_id = p.id and rp.post_status = 'active') as reply_count, (select count(*) from tbl_bookmark b where b.post_id = p.id) as bookmark_count, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_post_like pl2 where pl2.post_id = p.id and pl2.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_liked, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_bookmark b where b.post_id = p.id and b.member_id = #{memberId} ) then true else false end as is_bookmarked
mapper.select: select from tbl_post p join tbl_member m on p.member_id = m.id where p.reply_post_id = #{postId} and p.post_status = 'active' order by p.created_datetime asc
